/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/Demo02StaticAssetViewer.dir/Demo02StaticAssetViewer_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Demo02StaticAssetViewer.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Demo02StaticAssetViewer.dir/MainWindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Demo02StaticAssetViewer.dir/RenderWidget.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Demo02StaticAssetViewer.dir/asset/ModelAsset.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Demo02StaticAssetViewer.dir/asset/ModelLoader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Demo02StaticAssetViewer.dir/asset/AssimpModelLoader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Demo02StaticAssetViewer.dir/render/MeshRenderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Demo02StaticAssetViewer.dir/render/GridRenderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Demo02StaticAssetViewer.dir/render/AxisRenderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Demo02StaticAssetViewer.dir/render/BoundingBoxRenderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Demo02StaticAssetViewer.dir/camera/OrbitCamera.cpp.o -o Demo02StaticAssetViewer  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6OpenGLWidgets.so.6.4.2 -lassimp /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Widgets.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6OpenGL.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Gui.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Core.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so
